package rulecoverage

func NegativeHandlerCallsGormDirectlyOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "handler_calls_gorm_directly_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handler packages that import `gorm.io/gorm` and build query chains directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
